历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 28109 → 27613 → 31315 → 31680 → 35524, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7900 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 35524; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 109, 110, 110, 112, and 111 respectively, basically stable at around 110; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 158, an expansion of about 42.3% compared to 2025, causing a significant change in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 83rd (2026), with slight fluctuations between 81 and 85 in recent years, overall stable; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics-related public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 51), short video exposure is moderately high; historical abnormal admission record: a sharp drop in Shaanxi Liberal Arts ranking in 2022 (low attention), with limited impact on Physics Category; Landscape Architecture is A+ (top nationally), consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, strongly attractive for related major applications; other discipline evaluation data is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with high social popularity, closely related to the university's enrollment majors; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), significantly intensifying competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of Physics Category in 2026 (+42.3%), and the notable increase in provincial examinees (about +32%), the expansion causes the ranking number to increase (intensified competition), and the surge in examinees further raises competition intensity; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 44847, with a range of 44347–45347.
